headline: Jeff Shell leaves Paramount after allegations of SEC violations; company calls claims 'baseless'
summary: Paramount President Jeff Shell is leaving his position after a lawsuit accused him of violating SEC rules.

headline: Dear Netflix Stock Fans, Mark Your Calendars for April 16
summary: Upcoming earnings appear hopeful with solid growth estimates and 'Strong Buy' analysts' consensus. Should you add NFLX to your list now?

headline: Netflix Lost the Battle for Warner Bros, but Goldman Sachs Says It Won the War
summary: As Netflix exits the Warner Bros. acquisition deal, Goldman Sachs analyst sees it as a smart move, projecting solid upside ahead and backing NFLX stock as a “Buy” now.

raw.headline: Netflix Lost the Battle for Warner Bros, but Goldman Sachs Says It Won the War
raw.summary: As Netflix exits the Warner Bros. acquisition deal, Goldman Sachs analyst sees it as a smart move, projecting solid upside ahead and backing NFLX stock as a “Buy” now.

headline: 1 Unpopular Stock That Deserves Some Love and 2 Facing Headwinds
summary: Wall Street has issued downbeat forecasts for the stocks in this article. These predictions are rare - financial institutions typically hesitate to say bad things about a company because it can jeopardize their other revenue-generating business lines like M&A advisory.
